attributes.title: logstash-*
attributes.name: Logstash pipeline
attributes.runtimeFieldMap: {"correlation.origin":{"type":"keyword","script":{"source":"def appName = ''; if (doc.containsKey('application_name.keyword') && doc['application_name.keyword'].size() > 0) { appName = doc['application_name.keyword'].value; } else if (doc.containsKey('application_name') && doc['application_name'].size() > 0) { appName = doc['application_name'].value; } if (appName.length() > 0) { def m = /^(exercises-[^;]+);req=(.+)$/.matcher(appName); if (m.find()) { emit(m.group(1)); } }"}},"correlation.request_id":{"type":"keyword","script":{"source":"def appName = ''; if (doc.containsKey('application_name.keyword') && doc['application_name.keyword'].size() > 0) { appName = doc['application_name.keyword'].value; } else if (doc.containsKey('application_name') && doc['application_name'].size() > 0) { appName = doc['application_name'].value; } if (appName.length() > 0) { def m = /^(exercises-[^;]+);req=(.+)$/.matcher(appName); if (m.find()) { emit(m.group(2)); } }"}},"sql.op":{"type":"keyword","script":{"source":"if (doc.containsKey('ps.keyword') && doc['ps.keyword'].size() > 0) { def ps = doc['ps.keyword'].value.toUpperCase(); if (ps.equals('SELECT') || ps.equals('INSERT') || ps.equals('UPDATE') || ps.equals('DELETE')) { emit(ps); } } if (doc.containsKey('message.keyword') && doc['message.keyword'].size() > 0) { def m = /(?i)\\b(SELECT|INSERT|UPDATE|DELETE)\\b/.matcher(doc['message.keyword'].value); if (m.find()) { emit(m.group(1).toUpperCase()); } }"}}}
